description: A murky, bubbling pool of expired apple juice and marsh weed. The air smells strongly of fermentation and vinegar.

exit_west.description: A gate opening back to the Scary Scrapyard.

swamp_wall.description: Dense, tangled walls of swamp bramble and petrified apple branches.

floor.description: Slightly muddy, sticky ground near the swamp edge.

swamp_pool.description: Deep, bubbling pools of fermented apple juice. Far too sticky to walk through.

banzo_builder.description: A clever-looking monkey wearing overalls. He seems willing to help you cross for a fee.

dialogue.text: "Ah, travelers! You want to cross the apple juice swamp? It's extremely sticky. I can construct a sturdy bridge out of giant bananas, but it requires a lot of energy. Bring me some Spicy Noodles to keep me going!"
dialogue.hint: Collect Spicy Noodles from the noodle factory.

dialogue.text: "Do you have the Spicy Noodles? I'm starving!" Banzo asks expectantly.
"Mmm! These noodles have a serious kick!" Banzo cheers as he devours them. In a flurry of motion, he lashes together massive bananas to form a bridge! "There you go! Safely crossable!"
"Have a safe trip across the Banana Bridge! And remember, starchy meals are the key to building speed!" Banzo waves.

banana_bridge.description: The back of a giant banana. It's surprisingly stable.

conditions.failMessage: There's only expired apple juice here. You need a way to cross!

swamp_hollow.description: A hollow in a petrified tree trunk. Safe from the sticky mud.

exit_east.description: A small mud trail leading out of the swamp towards a cultivated field.
